title: Italian Beef Wrap
description: A comforting Italian-inspired beef wrap filled with tender beef and flavorful vegetables.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the Italian seasoning, garlic, onion, and bell pepper. Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Warm the tortilla wrap in the microwave for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by placing the beef and vegetable mixture on the tortilla, followed by the shredded mozzarella cheese and fresh basil.
Cook the beef to an internal temperature of at least 145°F (63°C) to ensure food safety.
Let the beef rest for a few minutes before slicing it thinly.
Slice the onion and bell pepper into thin strips.
